calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Off Calendar

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Continued To Feb-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Fred Levinson, Trustee of the Levinson Family Revoc. Trust is present.
Attorney Jonathan Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Lopez is present.
Attorney Tom H. Elke representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

Counsel tentatively settle and request the trial date continued for settled protective date which the court grants.

The trial date of FEB-21-2012 is continued to 2-27-2012 @ 9:00AM in Dept. 501.
